description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Test that runs on every pull request and push. The workflow has three jobs: tests, check_cachix, and installer_test. The tests job runs on a matrix of ubuntu-latest and macos-latest, checks out the repository, installs Nix, and runs nix-build. The check_cachix job checks if Cachix secrets are present. The installer job depends on tests and check_cachix, and runs on ubuntu-latest if a push event occurs and Cachix secrets are present. The installer_test job depends on installer and check_cachix, runs on a matrix of ubuntu-latest and macos-latest if a push event occurs and Cachix secrets are present, and tests the installer.
